---
title: "Combined SpliceAI MAF Heatmap (Protein Coding + Control)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 16, fig.height = 12)
```

## Load Libraries

```{r libraries}
library(data.table)
library(pheatmap)
library(viridis)
library(beepr)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
```

## Load Data

```{r load-data}
# Read the protein coding dataset
protein_coding_data <- fread("../results/splice_out_v1/SpliceAI_MAF_protein_coding.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
cat("Protein coding dataset loaded:\n")
cat("  Number of decoy IDs:", nrow(protein_coding_data), "\n")
cat("  Number of species:", ncol(protein_coding_data) - 1, "\n")

# Read the filtered control dataset
control_data <- fread("../results/splice_out_v1/ctrl_output/control_spliceai_filtered_protein_coding.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
cat("\nControl dataset loaded:\n")
cat("  Number of decoy IDs:", nrow(control_data), "\n")
cat("  Number of species:", ncol(control_data) - 1, "\n")
```

## Add Suffixes and Combine Datasets

```{r add-suffixes-combine}
# Add _D suffix to protein coding decoy IDs
protein_coding_data$decoyID <- paste0(protein_coding_data$decoyID, "_D")

cat("Added _D suffix to protein coding decoy IDs\n")
cat("  Example:", protein_coding_data$decoyID[1], "\n")

# Control dataset already has _C and _P suffixes
cat("\nControl dataset suffixes:\n")
canonical_count <- sum(grepl("_C$", control_data$decoyID))
nonprpf8_count <- sum(grepl("_P$", control_data$decoyID))
cat("  Canonical (_C):", canonical_count, "\n")
cat("  NonPRPF8 (_P):", nonprpf8_count, "\n")

# Combine datasets
combined_data <- rbindlist(list(protein_coding_data, control_data), use.names = TRUE, fill = FALSE)

cat("\nCombined dataset:\n")
cat("  Total decoy IDs:", nrow(combined_data), "\n")
cat("  Protein coding (_D):", sum(grepl("_D$", combined_data$decoyID)), "\n")
cat("  Canonical (_C):", sum(grepl("_C$", combined_data$decoyID)), "\n")
cat("  NonPRPF8 (_P):", sum(grepl("_P$", combined_data$decoyID)), "\n")
```

## Prepare Data Matrix for K-means Clustering

```{r prepare-matrix-kmeans}
# Extract decoy IDs (first column)
decoy_ids_kmeans <- combined_data$decoyID

# Extract numeric data (all columns except first)
data_matrix_kmeans <- as.matrix(combined_data[, -1, with = FALSE])

# Set row names
rownames(data_matrix_kmeans) <- decoy_ids_kmeans

# Read species order and mapping
species_order <- fread("../data//Newickspeciesorder.txt", header = FALSE, col.names = "tree_name")
species_mapping <- fread("../results/tree_to_clade_mapping.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
ordered_species <- merge(species_order, species_mapping, by = "tree_name", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
ordered_species_ids <- ordered_species$species_id[!is.na(ordered_species$species_id)]

# Reorder columns to match Newick order
data_matrix_kmeans <- data_matrix_kmeans[, ordered_species_ids, drop = FALSE]

# Remove rows that are entirely -1 (can't cluster these)
rows_all_neg1 <- rowSums(data_matrix_kmeans != -1) == 0
if (sum(rows_all_neg1) > 0) {
  cat("K-means matrix: Removing", sum(rows_all_neg1), "rows that are entirely -1\n")
  data_matrix_kmeans <- data_matrix_kmeans[!rows_all_neg1, ]
  decoy_ids_kmeans <- decoy_ids_kmeans[!rows_all_neg1]
  rownames(data_matrix_kmeans) <- decoy_ids_kmeans
}

# Transpose matrix: species become rows (y-axis), decoy IDs become columns (x-axis)
data_matrix_kmeans <- t(data_matrix_kmeans)
colnames(data_matrix_kmeans) <- decoy_ids_kmeans

# Map species IDs to common names for row labels
species_id_to_common <- setNames(species_mapping$matched_common_name, species_mapping$species_id)
current_rownames_kmeans <- rownames(data_matrix_kmeans)
common_names_kmeans <- ifelse(current_rownames_kmeans %in% names(species_id_to_common),
  species_id_to_common[current_rownames_kmeans],
  current_rownames_kmeans
)
rownames(data_matrix_kmeans) <- common_names_kmeans

# Final check for kmeans matrix
cat("\nK-means matrix final check:\n")
cat("  Matrix dimensions:", dim(data_matrix_kmeans), "\n")
cat("  -1 values:", sum(data_matrix_kmeans == -1), "\n")
cat("  Value range:", min(data_matrix_kmeans), "to", max(data_matrix_kmeans), "\n")
```

## Create Color Palette and K-means Clustering

```{r color-paletteandclustering}
# Create color palette: grey for -1, viridis for 0-1
n_colors <- 100
color_gradient <- c("grey90", viridis(n_colors))

# Perform kmeans clustering on columns (decoy IDs) with 6 centers
data_for_kmeans <- t(data_matrix_kmeans)

# Perform kmeans clustering (k=6)
set.seed(42) # For reproducibility
kmeans_result <- kmeans(data_for_kmeans, centers = 6, iter.max = 100, nstart = 10)

# Get cluster assignments
cluster_assignments <- kmeans_result$cluster

cat("K-means clustering completed:\n")
cat("  Number of clusters: 6\n")
cat("  Cluster sizes:\n")
for (i in 1:6) {
  cat(sprintf("    Cluster %d: %d decoy IDs\n", i, sum(cluster_assignments == i)))
}
```

## Extract Clusters and Create Column Annotations

```{r extract-clusters-annotations}
# Create function to extract suffix from decoy ID
get_suffix <- function(decoy_id) {
  if (grepl("_D$", decoy_id)) return("Decoy")
  if (grepl("_C$", decoy_id)) return("Canonical")
  if (grepl("_P$", decoy_id)) return("NonPRPF8")
  return("Unknown")
}

# Create list to store cluster data
cluster_list <- list()
cluster_annotations <- list()

for (cluster_num in 1:6) {
  # Get decoy IDs in this cluster
  cluster_decoy_ids <- names(cluster_assignments)[cluster_assignments == cluster_num]
  
  # Extract subset of matrix for this cluster
  cluster_matrix <- data_matrix_kmeans[, cluster_decoy_ids, drop = FALSE]
  
  # Create column annotation based on suffix
  cluster_annotation <- data.frame(
    Origin = factor(sapply(cluster_decoy_ids, get_suffix)),
    row.names = cluster_decoy_ids
  )
  
  cluster_list[[cluster_num]] <- cluster_matrix
  cluster_annotations[[cluster_num]] <- cluster_annotation
  
  cat(sprintf("Cluster %d: %d decoy IDs\n", cluster_num, length(cluster_decoy_ids)))
  cat(sprintf("  Decoy (_D): %d\n", sum(cluster_annotation$Origin == "Decoy")))
  cat(sprintf("  Canonical (_C): %d\n", sum(cluster_annotation$Origin == "Canonical")))
  cat(sprintf("  NonPRPF8 (_P): %d\n", sum(cluster_annotation$Origin == "NonPRPF8")))
  cat("\n")
}
```

## Generate Full Heatmap (All Clusters, Sorted by Max SpliceAI Score)

```{r full-heatmap-sorted, fig.width=20, fig.height=16}
# Ensure cluster_assignments has names matching matrix column names
# The cluster assignments should already have names from kmeans, but ensure alignment
if (is.null(names(cluster_assignments))) {
  names(cluster_assignments) <- colnames(data_matrix_kmeans)
}

# Sort columns by cluster assignment, then by ascending max value within each cluster
# First, calculate max value for each column (ignoring -1 values)
col_max_values <- apply(data_matrix_kmeans, 2, function(x) {
  x_clean <- x[x != -1] # Remove -1 values
  if (length(x_clean) == 0) {
    return(-1)
  } # If all -1, return -1
  max(x_clean, na.rm = TRUE)
})

# Create a data frame with column index, cluster assignment, and max value
# Ensure cluster assignments are aligned with column names
col_info <- data.frame(
  col_idx = seq_len(ncol(data_matrix_kmeans)),
  decoy_id = colnames(data_matrix_kmeans),
  cluster = cluster_assignments[colnames(data_matrix_kmeans)],
  max_val = col_max_values,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Sort: first by cluster, then by ascending max value within cluster
col_info_sorted <- col_info[order(col_info$cluster, col_info$max_val), ]
cluster_order <- col_info_sorted$col_idx

# Reorder columns based on cluster and max value sorting
data_matrix_kmeans_clustered <- data_matrix_kmeans[, cluster_order, drop = FALSE]

# Ensure column names are preserved (decoy IDs)
colnames(data_matrix_kmeans_clustered) <- colnames(data_matrix_kmeans)[cluster_order]

# Create column annotation data frame with cluster numbers (matching the reordered columns)
col_annotation_full <- data.frame(
  Cluster = factor(col_info_sorted$cluster),
  row.names = col_info_sorted$decoy_id
)

cat("Full heatmap preparation completed:\n")
cat("  Columns reordered by cluster assignment, then by ascending max value within each cluster\n")
cat("  Total columns:", ncol(data_matrix_kmeans_clustered), "\n")

# Create full heatmap with pre-clustered columns using kmeans (k=6)
# Matrix is transposed: species are rows (y-axis), decoy IDs are columns (x-axis)
png("Combined_heatmap_full_sorted_by_max.png", width = 2400, height = 2000, res = 150)
pheatmap(
  data_matrix_kmeans_clustered,
  color = color_gradient,
  na_col = "grey90", # For any remaining NA values
  cluster_rows = FALSE, # Keep species in Newick order
  cluster_cols = FALSE, # Use pre-computed kmeans order (sorted by max score)
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  fontsize_row = 8, # Font size for species names
  fontsize_col = 6,
  main = "Combined Dataset All Clusters (K-means k=6, Sorted by Max SpliceAI Score)",
  treeheight_row = 0, # No row dendrogram (using fixed order)
  treeheight_col = 0, # No column dendrogram (using kmeans order)
  breaks = c(-1.1, -0.5, seq(0, 1, length.out = n_colors)), # Grey for -1, viridis for 0-1
  annotation_col = col_annotation_full # Add cluster number annotations to columns
)
dev.off()
beep()
```

## Generate Heatmaps for Each Cluster

```{r heatmap-cluster-1, fig.width=20, fig.height=16}
# Cluster 1
png("Combined_heatmap_cluster1.png", width = 2400, height = 2000, res = 150)
pheatmap(
  cluster_list[[1]],
  color = color_gradient,
  na_col = "grey90",
  cluster_rows = FALSE, # Keep species in Newick order
  cluster_cols = TRUE, # Hierarchical clustering on columns
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  main = "Combined Dataset Cluster 1 (Hierarchical Clustering on Columns)",
  treeheight_row = 0,
  treeheight_col = 50,
  breaks = c(-1.1, -0.5, seq(0, 1, length.out = n_colors)),
  annotation_col = cluster_annotations[[1]]
)
dev.off()
beep()
```

```{r heatmap-cluster-2, fig.width=20, fig.height=16}
# Cluster 2
png("Combined_heatmap_cluster2.png", width = 2400, height = 2000, res = 150)
pheatmap(
  cluster_list[[2]],
  color = color_gradient,
  na_col = "grey90",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  main = "Combined Dataset Cluster 2 (Hierarchical Clustering on Columns)",
  treeheight_row = 0,
  treeheight_col = 50,
  breaks = c(-1.1, -0.5, seq(0, 1, length.out = n_colors)),
  annotation_col = cluster_annotations[[2]]
)
dev.off()
beep()
```

```{r heatmap-cluster-3, fig.width=20, fig.height=16}
# Cluster 3
png("Combined_heatmap_cluster3.png", width = 2400, height = 2000, res = 150)
pheatmap(
  cluster_list[[3]],
  color = color_gradient,
  na_col = "grey90",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  main = "Combined Dataset Cluster 3 (Hierarchical Clustering on Columns)",
  treeheight_row = 0,
  treeheight_col = 50,
  breaks = c(-1.1, -0.5, seq(0, 1, length.out = n_colors)),
  annotation_col = cluster_annotations[[3]]
)
dev.off()
beep()
```

```{r heatmap-cluster-4, fig.width=20, fig.height=16}
# Cluster 4
png("Combined_heatmap_cluster4.png", width = 2400, height = 2000, res = 150)
pheatmap(
  cluster_list[[4]],
  color = color_gradient,
  na_col = "grey90",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  main = "Combined Dataset Cluster 4 (Hierarchical Clustering on Columns)",
  treeheight_row = 0,
  treeheight_col = 50,
  breaks = c(-1.1, -0.5, seq(0, 1, length.out = n_colors)),
  annotation_col = cluster_annotations[[4]]
)
dev.off()
beep()
```

```{r heatmap-cluster-5, fig.width=20, fig.height=16}
# Cluster 5
png("Combined_heatmap_cluster5.png", width = 2400, height = 2000, res = 150)
pheatmap(
  cluster_list[[5]],
  color = color_gradient,
  na_col = "grey90",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  main = "Combined Dataset Cluster 5 (Hierarchical Clustering on Columns)",
  treeheight_row = 0,
  treeheight_col = 50,
  breaks = c(-1.1, -0.5, seq(0, 1, length.out = n_colors)),
  annotation_col = cluster_annotations[[5]]
)
dev.off()
beep()
```

```{r heatmap-cluster-6, fig.width=20, fig.height=16}
# Cluster 6
png("Combined_heatmap_cluster6.png", width = 2400, height = 2000, res = 150)
pheatmap(
  cluster_list[[6]],
  color = color_gradient,
  na_col = "grey90",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  main = "Combined Dataset Cluster 6 (Hierarchical Clustering on Columns)",
  treeheight_row = 0,
  treeheight_col = 50,
  breaks = c(-1.1, -0.5, seq(0, 1, length.out = n_colors)),
  annotation_col = cluster_annotations[[6]]
)
dev.off()
beep()
```

## Summary

```{r summary}
cat("Summary of Combined Dataset Analysis:\n")
cat("  Total decoy IDs:", nrow(combined_data), "\n")
cat("  Protein coding (_D):", sum(grepl("_D$", combined_data$decoyID)), "\n")
cat("  Canonical (_C):", sum(grepl("_C$", combined_data$decoyID)), "\n")
cat("  NonPRPF8 (_P):", sum(grepl("_P$", combined_data$decoyID)), "\n")
cat("\nCluster distribution:\n")
for (i in 1:6) {
  cat(sprintf("  Cluster %d: %d decoy IDs\n", i, sum(cluster_assignments == i)))
}
```
